mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_log (order_no, operate_type, operate_desc, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.operateType}, #{item.operateDesc}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO order_log (order_no, operate_type, operate_desc, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.operateType}, #{item.operateDesc}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE operate_type = VALUES(operate_type), operate_desc = VALUES(operate_desc), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
